text:
There was an old owl living in an old oak tree.

One day, a young woodpecker flew into the tree. He chirped cheerfully. The owl thought it sounded silly. So, he chirped back. The woodpecker just hummed. After some time, the owl decided to sing.

His song was hauntingly beautiful. The woodpecker paused. Then he listened. He hadn't heard an owl sing like that before.

For days he listened. The owl liked to play music.

One night, the woodpecker flew higher than ever before.

And somehow he heard the owl.

They became fast friends.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
